emails.subject: 4 Quarter Update
emails.body: 4 Quarter Update Rod and I are meeting with Stan Monday afternoon, October 22, to talk about the 4th Quarter. I have listed below the latest IBIT impact to Enron for the 4th Quarter that I have. Please let me know if there are any changes and provide any variance explanations if necessary. PGG $28.0 EREC $53.2 Azurix ($24.2) including Marlin Clean fuels ($21.1) EGAS ($14.1) EEOS ($26.6) Thanks Tracy

emails.subject: RE: 4 Quarter Update
emails.body: RE: 4 Quarter Update Tracey, Hughes is in London and I left him a voicemail about our 4th Qtr numbers. I'm sure he will reply tonight and I will send you the EGAS numbers first thing tomorrow morning. Sommers
